name: PULSE Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Chemist, pharmacy, sports, dining, and movies

domestic: 4 domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 1 visit per quarter.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership is provided for the first two membership years, with no complimentary lounge visits.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Noise ColorFit Pulse 4 Pro smart watch worth ₹7,999 on payment of joining fee
Complimentary 1-year Netmeds First membership subject to joining fee payment and at least one retail transaction

renewalBenefitsValued.label: Complimentary 1-year FITPASS PRO membership on card renewal every year

joiningBenefits: Noise ColorFit Pulse 4 Pro smart watch worth ₹7,999 on payment of joining fee
renewalBenefits: Complimentary 1-year FITPASS PRO membership on card renewal every year

milestones.label: ₹1,500 voucher on annual retail spends of ₹4 lakh

milestoneBenefits: ₹1,500 voucher on annual retail spends of ₹4 lakh
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from ₹500 to ₹4,000, capped at ₹250 per statement cycle

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card PULSE product page on 2026-06-08.
The product page currently highlights complimentary 1-year FITPASS PRO membership on renewal and Netmeds First membership subject to joining fee payment and at least one retail transaction.
Priority Pass membership is provided for the first two membership years but does not include complimentary international lounge visits.
Air accident cover is shown on the older local file but not carried forward here because the current live product page does not foreground it as an active benefit.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.
